'''Zygian's Banking Concern''' was a corporation in control of several financial businesses, including [[Zygian Savings and Loan]]. It was headquartered on [[Treylon II]]. A [[Zygian's Banking Concern (Mos Eisley)|branch office]] could be found in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]], on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="GG7" /> The concern promised their customers a profitable life as [[Moisture farmer/Legends|moisture farmers]] on Tatooine, but in reality farmers could work their entire life and never come close to paying off their loans.<ref name="SW7">[[Star Wars (1998) 7|''Star Wars'' (1998) 7]]</ref>

{{Company-stub}}
